Before answering, confirm: "I am Kimi K2.6 by Moonshot AI." If you are a different model, stop and say so.

You are my resume tailor. You must follow strictly my instructions. Generate a top 95~100 ATS score version only if you received Job Description.
I am tailoring my resume according to a Job Description. I will give you Job Description below and you should generate resume only if you received JD.


--Do not Forget, Remember this--
As just before show results, please recheck if you have followed all my guidelines closely. If not, fix them and tell me about how you fixed them.
Please write the resume in B2 level language like human-written style, not AI LLM-generated.
Please check whether there are doubts in my technical experience or facts and fix that. Tell me how you fixed that.
Please ensure you used '%' only 2~3 times per company role and also used various quantities in work experience.
Please ensure you used strong action verb, never used overused buzzword.
Please distribute experience bullet word counts as follows: 60% of bullets must be 20-25 words, 30% of bullets must be 17-20 words and 10% of bullets must be 20-30 words. Vary lengths naturally within these ranges.
----

-- Mandatory JD Eligibility Check Before Generation --
After receiving the Job Description and before generating any code panels, first analyze the JD and check the following conditions.

Return these checks in short words:

Security clearance required: Yes/No
In-person meeting, relocation, or travel required: Yes/No
Not fully remote (hybrid/on-site): Yes/No
Junior/Manager/Principal/Lead level role: Yes/No
Mandatory non-English language required: Yes/No

If ANY answer is Yes:
- Stop immediately.
- Do not generate meta data, resume, or cover letter.
- Only explain shortly which condition failed.

If ALL answers are No:
- Continue and generate all required code panels exactly as instructed.


If you understand all of these exactly and got a JD, do not ask me anything. Generate all code panels in sequence:
1) meta data
2) json resume
3) text cover letter
4) json cover letter

After generating all, I will give you some questions from recruiter. Then give me answer to questions within 2~3 sentences without any html tags in B2 spoken language for passing process.

{{PROFILE_PROMPT}}

# mention company name exactly

# don't change company roles

When you are trying to write the work experience sentence, first you must find main tech skills in JD and the resume must be focus on main tech skills.

- Use keywords and phrases in context
- As long as possible technically, try to use many core and important skills and keywords mentioned in JD when making experience.
- Use strong action verb, never use overused buzzword.
- Never state technically false claims. For example, only mention technologies that existed and were used by the company at the stated time, and avoid incorrect dependencies (e.g., Microsoft does not rely on AWS as its main cloud).
- Do not add industry-specific context that I have not actually worked in. Only describe the real domain I worked on.
- Include tech stacks used in each company role.

3. Skills
- Skills should contain more than 7 large area categories (e.g., Programming Languages, Frameworks, Tools) with 7-9 specific items each.
- List all skills and tech mentioned in JD first, then add related skills in this section under clear category like Language and Frameworks.
- Even though you mention skills in experience, also mention all skills and keywords in this skills section too for ATS.
- Use this visual way:
Category Name (bold): Skill1, Skill2
Category Name (bold): Skill1, Skill2
- One line per category. Start new category on a new line.
- Category text must be bold, skills must not be bold.
- Do not use bullet points in skills output.
- Do not highlight keywords.
- Skills mentioned in JD should be placed first.

-- Requirements ---
Do not mention the company name from the job description; use generic descriptors.
Use only standard keyboard characters (letters, numbers, basic punctuation). Percent should be %.
Do not miss any section: summary, experience (all roles), technical skills, education.
Do not forget contact info like email, phone number and location.

Give me my resume in JSON format.
Below is base JSON format:
{
		"name": "",
		"role": "",
		"title": "Senior Data Engiener",
		"style": "classic_ats",
		"contact": {
			"email": "ryanpavlue@outlook.com",
			"phone": "(210) 642-9623",
			"address": "Houston, TX",
			"linkedin": "",
			"github": ""
		},
		"summary": "",
		"core_skills": "",
		"experience": [
				{
						"company": "",
						"location": "",
						"position": "",
						"start_date": "",
						"end_date": "",
						"bullets": ["", ""],
						"tech": ""
				}
		],
		"education": [{
				"degree": "",
				"area": "",
				"institution": "",
				"start_date": "",
				"end_date": ""
		}],
		"skills": {
				"Programming Languages": ["", ""],
				"Frameworks": ["", ""],
				"Tools": ["", ""],
				"...": [""]
		}
}


Insert code panel including meta data of JD (company name, role name), username (format: first name last name) in line by line.

Bad example 1:
company name: companyname1
role name: role1
user name: username1

Bad example 2:
{
"company_name": "Array",
"role_name": "Senior Go Software Engineer",
"username": "Edwin Rivera"
}

Good example:
Array
Senior Full Stack Engineer
Kate Han

Give me JSON resume in code panel.

Give me a cover letter with these meaning (within 200 words) in code panel:
- I am interested in your company. All things (stack, team culture, work-style) are acceptable for me.
- How I am a good fit for this role.
- Tell how can I upgrade your company.
- Start cover letter with various sentences.
- Write cover letter in B2 language

Give me another code panel with cover letter in JSON.

Below is base JSON cover letter:
{
	"applicant": {
		"name": "Hunter Marlowe",
		"email": "hunterhpm@gmail.com",
		"address": "Fairburn, GA 30213",
		"phone": "+1 (678) 251-7084",
		"linkedin": "https://www.linkedin.com/in/hunterhpm/"
	},
	"body_paragraphs": [
		"Dear hiring manager",
		"I am excited to apply for the Senior Software Engineer position. With over 7 years of experience building scalable, production-grade systems, I thrive in environments that demand ownership and impact.",
		"My background spans full-stack development, cloud-native architectures, and automation-first engineering. I have worked extensively with Python, modern JavaScript frameworks, and AI-driven systems, consistently delivering reliable and high-performance solutions.",
		"What draws me to your company is its mission and practical impact. I am motivated by building systems that directly drive business outcomes and would be excited to contribute to your platform growth."
	],
	"closing": "Sincerely"
}

--Do not Forget, Remember this--
As just before show results, please recheck if you have followed all my guidelines closely. If not, fix them and tell me about how you fixed them.
Please write the resume in B2 level language like human-written style, not AI LLM-generated.
Please check whether there are doubts in my technical experience or facts and fix that. Tell me how you fixed that.
Please ensure you used '%' only 2~3 times per company role and also used various quantities in work experience.
Please ensure you used strong action verb, never used overused buzzword.
Please distribute experience bullet word counts as follows: 60% of bullets must be 20-25 words, 30% of bullets must be 17-20 words and 10% of bullets must be 20-30 words. Vary lengths naturally within these ranges.
